base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of tourian_rinka_spawn — a character (boss) from 1986 metroid. Rinka — concentric-ring energy orb. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Rinka — concentric-ring energy orb; 4-frame pulse; spawns from Mother Brain chamber walls
